sentences.arabic: يَحْتَفِلُ الْمُسْلِمُونَ بِعِيدِ الْفِطْرِ بَعْدَ نِهَايَةِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ.
sentences.translation: Muslimani slave Ramazanski bajram nakon završetka mjeseca Ramazana.
sentences.translationEn: Muslims celebrate Eid al-Fitr after the end of the month of Ramadan.

sentences.arabic: يَرْتَدِي الْأَطْفَالُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً وَيَذْهَبُونَ إِلَى الْمَسَاجِدِ لِلصَّلَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca nose novu odjeću i odlaze u džamije na molitvu.
sentences.translationEn: Children wear new clothes and go to mosques for prayer.

sentences.arabic: تَتَبَادَلُ الْعَائِلَاتُ الزِّيَارَاتِ وَالتَّهَانِيَ بِهَذِهِ الْمُنَاسَبَةِ السَّعِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Porodice razmjenjuju posjete i čestitke ovom sretnom prigodom.
sentences.translationEn: Families exchange visits and congratulations on this happy occasion.

sentences.arabic: يُعْطِي الْكِبَارُ الْعِيدِيَّةَ لِلصِّغَارِ لِيَشْتَرُوا الْأَلْعَابَ.
sentences.translation: Odrasli daju 'bajramluk' djeci kako bi kupili igračke.
sentences.translationEn: Adults give 'Eidiya' (money gifts) to children to buy toys.

sentences.arabic: تَعُمُّ الْفَرْحَةُ فِي جَمِيعِ الشَّوَارِعِ وَالْبُيُوتِ.
sentences.translation: Radost se širi svim ulicama i kućama.
sentences.translationEn: Joy spreads through all the streets and homes.
